description_long: This is a portable cement mixer featuring a large, conical rotating drum mounted on a sturdy metal support frame. The drum is equipped with a prominent gear ring for rotation, and a hand wheel on the side allows manual tilting or adjustment. The mixer is supported by two solid rubber wheels at the rear and a stable metal base at the front, making it easy to move and position. An enclosed motor housing with ventilation holes and control buttons is attached to one side, providing power for the drum's rotation. The drum has an open top for loading materials and a slightly tapered bottom for efficient mixing and discharge. The overall finish is a durable industrial yellow, typical for construction equipment, with black accents on the wheels and mechanical parts.
description: A portable yellow cement mixer with a large conical drum, hand wheel, and sturdy metal frame on two wheels, featuring a motor housing and control buttons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the conical drum, gear ring, hand wheel, and motor housing with control buttons, as well as both wheels and the support frame.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the motor housing, both wheels, and the closed rear panel of the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum, gear ring, hand wheel, and the other side of the support frame, with the motor housing visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open mouth of the drum, the hand wheel, and the support frame, with the caution label and gear ring clearly visible.
